description: Detects void* parameters and return types that bypass type safety. Simplified from Rust: flags all parameter_declaration nodes with void type and pointer_declarator without checking for const void*, callback context patterns, or function-pointer co-occurrence. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Pointer parameter detected -- verify void* parameters are intentional. void* bypasses type safety and requires manual casting by callers. Consider using concrete types or typed callbacks. const void* is acceptable for generic read-only data (e.g., qsort comparator).
